name: RABBIT-BUG-6
title: rabbit-bug skill bypasses Skill tool for rabbit-feature-scope — runs resolve-scope.sh directly via Bash
description: During bug filing, the rabbit-bug skill instructs the agent to 'invoke rabbit-feature-scope'. The agent skips Skill('rabbit-feature-scope') and instead runs .claude/features/rabbit-feature-scope/scripts/resolve-scope.sh directly via the Bash tool, then dispatches a raw Agent call. This bypasses the skill indirection layer — updates to the rabbit-feature-scope skill will not be picked up, and the contract between rabbit-bug and rabbit-feature-scope is violated. The rabbit-bug skill text must be explicit that invocation must go through the Skill tool.
